title: WebSocket connection failure behind Apache reverse proxy
symptom: WebSocket connections for real-time updates in n8n fail to establish when running behind an Apache reverse proxy. This prevents features like Telegram trigger testing from functioning correctly.
applies_when: Using n8n behind an Apache reverse proxy
not_this_if: WebSocket works without a reverse proxy
root_cause: The initial Apache configuration did not properly handle WebSocket connections, lacking necessary headers and correct routing for WebSocket traffic. This caused the WebSocket connection attempts to fail.
fix_steps: Update the Apache vhost configuration to include proper WebSocket handling with the required headers.
Ensure the Docker environment variables for n8n are correctly set, particularly N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL and N8N_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.
agent_instruction: Modify the Apache vhost and Docker configuration as specified to enable WebSocket support.
